name: cc plz
description: The universal MapleStory phrase requesting another player to change channels at a popular training spot. A staple of the MapleStory experience that transcended language barriers across all regional servers.
description_ko: 인기 사냥터에서 다른 플레이어에게 채널을 바꿔달라고 요청하는 메이플스토리의 보편적인 문구. 언어 장벽을 넘어 모든 지역 서버에서 통용된 메이플 경험의 상징.
related_mechanic: Channel system and popular training maps
origin_story: Due to limited channels and popular grinding spots, players would often whisper others asking them to leave the map. 'cc plz' became the shortest and most universal way to express this across all regions.

description: The iconic visual of Free Market chat spam. Players would prefix their buy/sell messages with rows of @ symbols to attract attention in the crowded marketplace, creating a wall of text that became synonymous with FM culture.
description_ko: 자유시장 채팅 스팸의 상징적인 모습. 플레이어들이 북적이는 시장에서 관심을 끌기 위해 매매 메시지 앞에 @ 기호를 대량으로 붙여 FM 문화의 상징이 된 텍스트 벽을 만들었다.
related_mechanic: Free Market trading system and chat visibility
origin_story: In the Free Market, dozens of players competed to have their buy/sell messages seen. Using @@@@ pushed your message to stand out visually in the chat flood. Rooms closer to entrance (FM 1) were the most competitive.

name: J>PQ
description: Short for 'Join Party Quest' - the universal call to arms for party quest recruitment. Kerning PQ, Ludi PQ, and Orbis PQ were legendary social experiences where strangers became friends.
description_ko: '파티퀘스트 참가' 의 줄임말 - 파티퀘스트 모집을 위한 만국 공용 외침. 커닝 파퀘, 루디 파퀘, 오르비스 파퀘는 모르는 사람이 친구가 되는 전설적인 사교 경험이었다.
related_mechanic: Party Quest system requiring specific party compositions
origin_story: Party Quests required full parties of 4-6 players. Players would shout 'J>PQ' or 'J>KPQ' at the entrance maps, often waiting 30+ minutes to form a group. The bonding during this wait was a core social experience.

name: defame
description: The daily fame/defame system created a unique social dynamic. Players could give or remove one fame point per day. 'Defaming' became both a threat and a form of social punishment for perceived wrongdoing.
description_ko: 일일 인기도/비인기도 시스템이 독특한 사회적 역학을 만들었다. 하루에 한 번 인기도를 올리거나 깎을 수 있었다. '비매'는 잘못된 행동에 대한 위협이자 사회적 제재의 한 형태가 되었다.
related_mechanic: Fame system allowing one fame/defame action per day
origin_story: The fame system was one of MapleStory's earliest social features. Some equipment required minimum fame to wear, making defame especially painful. Players would defame for revenge, fun, or just because they could.

name: henehoe
description: A playful term for players who spent most of their time hanging out in Henesys, the main social hub, rather than actually playing the game. Often dressed in NX cash shop outfits, chatting and showing off.
description_ko: 실제 게임 플레이 대신 메인 소셜 허브인 헤네시스에서 대부분의 시간을 보내는 플레이어를 가리키는 장난스러운 용어. 주로 캐시 의상을 입고 채팅하며 자랑하는 것이 특징.
related_mechanic: Henesys as the central social hub town
origin_story: Henesys was the most populated town due to its central location and pleasant aesthetics. Many players would log in just to hang out, chat, and show off their avatars, creating a unique 'virtual mall' culture.

name: ks
description: Kill stealing - one of the most heated conflicts in MapleStory. When another player enters your training map and starts killing monsters, the resulting drama could escalate into whisper wars, guild conflicts, and legendary server rivalries.
description_ko: 킬 스틸 - 메이플스토리에서 가장 뜨거운 갈등 중 하나. 다른 플레이어가 사냥 맵에 들어와 몬스터를 잡기 시작하면, 귓말 전쟁, 길드 분쟁, 전설적인 서버 라이벌리로 확대될 수 있었다.
related_mechanic: Open-world training maps with no reservation system
origin_story: With no instanced training maps, popular spots were first-come-first-served. KS wars could last hours, with both sides refusing to leave. This spawned cc plz culture and became a defining MapleStory experience.

name: You don't quit MapleStory, you just take a break
name_ko: 메이플은 접는 게 아니라 쉬는 거다
description: The most universally acknowledged truth of MapleStory. No matter how many times players 'quit,' they inevitably return. Whether it's nostalgia, a new class, or a friend starting up again, MapleStory always calls you back.
description_ko: 메이플스토리에서 가장 보편적으로 인정받는 진리. 아무리 많이 '접어도' 결국 돌아온다. 향수, 새로운 직업, 친구의 복귀 등 메이플스토리는 항상 다시 부른다.
related_mechanic: The game's addictive progression loop and nostalgia factor
origin_story: Observed over two decades of MapleStory's existence. Players who dramatically announced their retirement would inevitably be seen online again within months. This cycle repeated so consistently it became a universal meme.

name: Free Market
description: The iconic trading hub where players set up personal shops, haggled prices, and experienced the chaotic beauty of a player-driven economy. The FM was removed in favor of the Auction House, but its memory lives on as peak MapleStory social experience.
description_ko: 개인 상점을 열고, 가격을 흥정하고, 플레이어 주도 경제의 혼란스러운 아름다움을 경험한 상징적인 거래 허브. 경매장으로 대체되었지만 최고의 메이플 사교 경험으로 기억에 남아있다.
related_mechanic: Player-owned shops in Free Market rooms 1-22
origin_story: The Free Market was MapleStory's player economy center. FM Room 1 was prime real estate, with shop permits being valuable items. Walking through FM was like visiting a bazaar - chaotic, overwhelming, and uniquely magical.

name: B>fame
description: Buying fame - players would pay mesos to strangers for their daily fame point. Some equipment had fame requirements, making this a real economy. The going rate varied by server, creating a micro-market for social approval.
description_ko: 인기도 구매 - 플레이어들이 일일 인기도 포인트를 위해 낯선 사람에게 메소를 지불했다. 일부 장비에 인기도 요구치가 있어 실제 경제가 형성되었다. 서버별로 시세가 달라 사회적 인정에 대한 미시경제가 만들어졌다.
related_mechanic: Fame system with daily limits and equipment fame requirements
origin_story: Certain equipment like the Reverse/Timeless gear required fame thresholds. Players who needed fame quickly would buy it in Henesys, shouting 'B>fame 50k' and standing still while strangers clicked the fame button.

name: Scammer
description: Scamming was an unfortunate but formative part of early MapleStory. From fake trades to item swap tricks, getting scammed was almost a rite of passage that taught hard lessons about trust in online games.
description_ko: 사기는 초기 메이플스토리의 불행하지만 성장의 일부였다. 가짜 거래부터 아이템 교체 트릭까지, 사기를 당하는 것은 온라인 게임에서 신뢰에 대한 값비싼 교훈을 가르치는 통과의례와 같았다.
related_mechanic: Player-to-player trading window and trust-based transactions
origin_story: Common scams included swapping items at the last second in the trade window, offering to 'scroll' items and never returning them, or selling fake 'godly' equipment. Every veteran has at least one scam story.

name: Rigged rates
description: The eternal conspiracy theory that Nexon manipulates enhancement and scroll success rates. Whether it's cubes, Star Force, or scrolling, players are convinced the displayed percentages are lies. This became a massive controversy when internal data leaks seemed to confirm suspicions.
description_ko: 넥슨이 강화 및 주문서 성공 확률을 조작한다는 영원한 음모론. 큐브, 스타포스, 주문서 등 어디서든 표시된 확률이 거짓이라고 확신한다. 내부 데이터 유출이 의혹을 확인하는 듯하면서 대규모 논란이 되었다.
related_mechanic: All probability-based enhancement systems
origin_story: Years of players feeling that 30% success rates failed far more than 70% of the time. The theory gained enormous credibility during the 'Nexon probability controversy' in Korea, leading to legislation requiring companies to disclose actual rates.

name: Pay-to-win / Cash spending
description: The love-hate relationship with NX Cash and real money spending. '현질' (hyunjil) literally means 'real money quality' and refers to spending real cash on the game. The eternal debate between free-to-play purists and cash spenders defines MapleStory culture.
description_ko: NX 캐시와 현금 지출에 대한 애증의 관계. '현질'은 게임에 실제 현금을 쓰는 것을 의미한다. 무과금 순수주의자와 과금러 사이의 영원한 논쟁이 메이플스토리 문화를 정의한다.
related_mechanic: NX Cash Shop, cubes, pets, cosmetics, and convenience items
origin_story: MapleStory pioneered the free-to-play with microtransactions model. Over time, cash items evolved from cosmetics to power-enhancing items like cubes, creating the persistent P2W debate in the community.

name: Megaphone drama
description: The server-wide megaphone was MapleStory's version of social media. Used for guild recruitment, drama callouts, love confessions, breakup announcements, and legendary flame wars visible to the entire server.
description_ko: 전체 메가폰은 메이플스토리판 SNS였다. 길드 모집, 드라마 폭로, 사랑 고백, 이별 선언, 전 서버가 볼 수 있는 전설적인 설전에 사용되었다.
related_mechanic: Cash Shop megaphone items that broadcast messages server-wide
origin_story: Megaphones cost NX Cash, making them a premium communication tool. This didn't stop players from spending real money to air grievances, confess love, or engage in public arguments that the entire server watched like reality TV.

name: MapleStory Wedding
description: MapleStory's in-game wedding system was peak virtual romance. Complete with wedding chapels, guest invitations, wedding rings with stats, and the Premium Wedding Package. Many childhood friendships and first 'relationships' happened here.
description_ko: 메이플스토리의 인게임 결혼 시스템은 가상 로맨스의 정점이었다. 웨딩 채플, 하객 초대, 스탯이 붙은 결혼반지, 프리미엄 웨딩 패키지까지 완비되었다. 많은 어린 시절의 우정과 첫 '연애'가 여기서 이루어졌다.
related_mechanic: Wedding system with Amoria, onyx chest rewards, and couple rings
origin_story: The wedding system in Amoria let two players get married, complete with a ceremony guests could attend. The Onyx Chest after the wedding gave valuable rewards. Many couples were purely for the ring stats, but some led to real friendships.

name: Pet food running out
description: The inevitable moment when your pet runs out of food and stops picking up items, always at the worst possible time - right in the middle of a boss fight or when a rare drop appears. A universally shared pain.
description_ko: 펫의 먹이가 떨어져 아이템 줍기를 멈추는 불가피한 순간, 항상 최악의 타이밍에 - 보스전 한가운데나 레어 드롭이 나올 때. 모두가 공감하는 고통.
related_mechanic: Pet system requiring food items to maintain auto-loot functionality
origin_story: Pets were essential for efficient gameplay as they auto-looted items. But pet food was a consumable that ran out, and players would forget to restock. The pet going on 'strike' during critical moments was a universal experience.

name: Boss queue
description: The daily ritual of entering boss fights with limited entry tickets. Missing your daily boss runs meant lost progression, creating a sense of obligation that blurred the line between fun and duty.
description_ko: 제한된 입장권으로 보스전에 참여하는 일일 의식. 일일 보스를 놓치면 진행 손실을 의미해, 재미와 의무 사이의 경계를 흐리는 의무감을 만들어냈다.
related_mechanic: Daily and weekly boss entry limits with valuable crystal rewards
origin_story: As bosses became the primary source of mesos through boss crystals, running all daily and weekly bosses became mandatory for progression. This created 'MapleStory homework' - a list of bosses to clear before reset.

name: Rock Paper Scissors trade
description: The informal gambling system where players would trade items based on rock-paper-scissors outcomes. A creative use of the emote system that became an underground gambling culture in Henesys and Free Market.
description_ko: 가위바위보 결과에 따라 아이템을 거래하는 비공식 도박 시스템. 이모티콘 시스템의 창의적 활용이 헤네시스와 자유시장에서 지하 도박 문화가 되었다.
related_mechanic: Emote system and player-to-player trading
origin_story: Players created their own gambling games using the rock-paper-scissors emote and the trade window. Stakes ranged from small mesos to valuable equipment. This was technically against ToS but was widely practiced.

name: Star Force gambling
description: The soul-crushing experience of Star Force enhancement. Watching your equipment explode at 15+ stars, losing billions of mesos, and the emotional rollercoaster of each enhancement attempt. 'Just one more try' is the motto that bankrupts players.
description_ko: 스타포스 강화의 영혼을 갈아넣는 경험. 15성 이상에서 장비가 터지는 것을 보고, 수십억 메소를 잃고, 매 강화 시도마다 감정 롤러코스터를 타는 것. '딱 한 번만 더'가 파산의 모토.
related_mechanic: Star Force enhancement system with destruction chance above 15 stars
origin_story: Star Force replaced the old scroll system as the primary equipment enhancement method. Above 12 stars, equipment can downgrade, and above 15 stars, it can be destroyed entirely. The meso cost escalates exponentially, creating a gambling addiction loop.

name: Potential cube rerolling
description: The endless cycle of using cubes to reroll potential stats, hoping for that perfect legendary line. Thousands of cubes and millions of mesos spent chasing the dream of 3-line legendary ATT% on every equipment piece.
description_ko: 완벽한 레전더리 옵션을 기대하며 잠재능력을 큐브로 돌리는 끝없는 순환. 모든 장비에 3줄 레전더리 공격력%를 꿈꾸며 수천 개의 큐브와 수억 메소를 소비한다.
related_mechanic: Potential system with Rare/Epic/Unique/Legendary tiers and cube rerolling
origin_story: The potential system added random stat bonuses to equipment, with cubes allowing rerolls. The astronomical odds of getting perfect lines made cubing one of the biggest meso sinks in the game and a core part of the P2W debate.

name: Budget potions
description: Using the cheapest potions possible to save mesos - White Potions, Mana Elixirs, and the classic Orange Potion. The meso-poor lifestyle of a young MapleStory player, chugging cheap potions between monster hits.
description_ko: 메소를 아끼기 위해 가장 저렴한 물약을 사용하는 것 - 하얀 물약, 마나 엘릭서, 클래식 오렌지 물약. 몬스터 사이사이에 싸구려 물약을 벌컥벌컥 마시는 메이플 초보의 빈곤한 생활.
related_mechanic: HP/MP potion consumption system and NPC shops
origin_story: In early MapleStory, potions were a significant expense. New players would use the cheapest potions and carefully manage their HP, sometimes dying because they were too stingy to buy better potions. The struggle was real.

name: Maple Island
description: The tutorial island where every MapleStory journey began. Fighting snails and mushrooms, meeting Mai and Lucas, and taking the ship to Victoria Island for the first time. Once you left, you could never return - making it a permanent source of nostalgia.
description_ko: 모든 메이플스토리 여정이 시작된 튜토리얼 섬. 달팽이와 버섯을 잡고, 마이와 루카스를 만나고, 처음으로 빅토리아 아일랜드로 가는 배를 타던 곳. 떠나면 돌아올 수 없어 영원한 향수의 원천이 되었다.
related_mechanic: One-way tutorial zone that players could never revisit
origin_story: Maple Island was every player's first experience. The innocence of fighting Snails and Blue Snails, the excitement of seeing Mushrooms, and the bittersweet ship ride to Victoria Island. Players who rushed through always regretted not savoring it.

name: 2x EXP event
description: The sacred double EXP event that turned casual players into hardcore grinders. Entire weekends planned around 2x events, setting alarms, canceling plans, and grinding non-stop. The ultimate MapleStory holiday.
description_ko: 캐주얼 유저를 하드코어 사냥꾼으로 변모시키는 신성한 2배 경험치 이벤트. 2배 이벤트에 맞춰 주말 전체를 계획하고, 알람을 맞추고, 약속을 취소하고, 쉬지 않고 사냥했다. 메이플스토리 최고의 축제.
related_mechanic: Server-wide EXP multiplier events, often on weekends or holidays
origin_story: 2x EXP events were the most anticipated events in MapleStory. They usually ran on weekends and holidays. The combination of 2x EXP coupons stacking with the event created legendary grinding sessions.

name: Server crash during events
description: The inevitable server crash whenever a popular event launches. Patch day disconnections, channel crashes during 2x EXP, and the dreaded 'You have been disconnected' message at the worst possible moment.
description_ko: 인기 이벤트가 시작될 때마다 피할 수 없는 서버 다운. 패치 날 접속 끊김, 2배 이벤트 중 채널 터짐, 최악의 순간에 뜨는 '접속이 끊어졌습니다' 메시지.
related_mechanic: Server infrastructure and player population spikes during events
origin_story: MapleStory servers have historically struggled with large player influxes during popular events. The combination of everyone logging in at once for new content or 2x EXP regularly crashed servers, becoming a running joke and source of frustration.

name: Maerini (MapleStory newbie)
description: A portmanteau of 'Maple' and '어린이' (child), used to describe new or inexperienced MapleStory players. Used both affectionately and mockingly, it reflects the steep learning curve of modern MapleStory's complex systems.
description_ko: '메이플'과 '어린이'의 합성어로, 새로운 또는 경험이 적은 메이플스토리 플레이어를 가리킨다. 애정과 조롱 모두로 사용되며, 현대 메이플의 복잡한 시스템의 가파른 학습 곡선을 반영한다.
related_mechanic: Complex game systems including potential, Star Force, Link Skills, Legion, V Matrix, HEXA Matrix
origin_story: As MapleStory evolved, the amount of knowledge needed to play efficiently grew enormously. New players were overwhelmed by systems like potentials, Star Force, Link Skills, and Legion. The community coined '메린이' following the Korean trend of adding '린이' to any hobby.

name: Nine Spirit Baby Dragon
description: The beloved Nine Spirit Baby Dragon pet that was every player's first pet experience. Its cute design and the thrill of having a pet follow you around made it an icon of early MapleStory. Players still hold deep nostalgia for this little dragon.
description_ko: 모든 플레이어의 첫 펫 경험이었던 사랑받는 나인스피릿 베이비 드래곤. 귀여운 디자인과 펫이 따라다니는 설렘이 초기 메이플의 아이콘이 되었다. 플레이어들은 아직도 이 작은 드래곤에 대한 깊은 향수를 간직하고 있다.
related_mechanic: Pet system with auto-loot and buff abilities
origin_story: The Nine Spirit Baby Dragon was one of the earliest and most accessible pets. Given through events or available for purchase, it became many players' introduction to the pet system. Its iconic appearance - a small, colorful dragon - is deeply ingrained in MapleStory nostalgia.
